title: Ultimate CPVP ModPack
description: Boost FPS, reduce lag, and dominate Crystal PvP with this lightweight, performance-optimized modpack. Built for speed, clarity, and smooth combat.
body:
⚡ Ultimate FPS & Crystal PvP Optimization Modpack ⚡

Dominate Crystal PvP with insane FPS, minimal lag, and lightning-fast performance.
This modpack combines top-tier optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight with fine-tuned settings for the smoothest PvP experience possible.

⚙️ Boost FPS • 💥 Reduce lag • 🌫️ Sharpen visuals • 🛠️ Perfect for low-end or high-end PCs.

Built for competitive Crystal PvP, this pack gives you the edge — faster hits, smoother movement, and no distractions.

More frames. Less lag. Maximum power.
